articles.title: ResMed (RMD) Sells MatrixCare To Refocus On Sleep And Respiratory Health
articles.summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) has agreed to divest its MatrixCare business to a private equity buyer. The deal centers on refocusing the company around its sleep and respiratory health technologies and connected care platform. The transaction reflects a move away from post acute care software toward ResMed's core medical device and digital health operations. For investors watching ResMed, the exit from MatrixCare marks a clear effort to tighten the company’s focus on sleep apnea, respiratory care...
